items.html: Now, just as this Ibur [conception] was for the need of correcting ZA [Zeir Anpin] — his points being incorporated and joined together — there must also be in it a correction for the female. And this was her correction now, in this Ibur: she was now incorporated in the two points of the middle line, which are Tifferet and Yesod. Afterwards — just as the middle line, too, was incorporated with the two other lines, as stated with us concerning ZA, for this is why the Ibur lasted twelve months, to incorporate this in that and that in this, whereby he became a single authority [Reshut HaYachid] — then she, too, was incorporated in all his points, as above, and cleaved to him completely in all the ten Sefirot in him. Through this Ibur she then grew, and her measure became equal to and as great as the measure of the very Yesod of ZA — and not as the measure of the other Sefirot.
